ab: nu saunay uli vaik amen kivanvan kati kina.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: nu maqadaw cangiangia a kalevelevan, ika ljaljeqel ika semezam tauta, sudjusy a vali.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: na qemiladj amen itua zaleman kemakan ta pang, aza teljare na qadaw pazarezar itua kacavacavan, semeljec aravac.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光照在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.
In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: ku kivadaqan ti kina, akumaya qudjidjilj a kalevelevan.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: aya ti kina, masa uli mangetjez anga buhu.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: nuqezemetj neka qerepus i kalevelevan, tjevutanga vitjuqan.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: uli vaik anga men matjumaq tauta.
a si vaikan matjumaq a djalan, kipenetj aken tua vitjuqan.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願.
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: ulja ika mangetjez a buhu, sa vaik anan na ken ljisasaw a kivanvan.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
